babyDevelopment: The lungs are starting to produce surfactant, a substance that will help them inflate and stay open after birth. The baby can now hear external noises clearly.
bodyChanges: You've officially gained a noticeable amount of weight. You might notice 'pregnancy brain' causing forgetfulness, and swelling in your feet and ankles (edema).
tips: Remove rings if your fingers swell
Listen to classical music or talk to the baby

do: Invest in comfortable shoes (maybe a size up!)
dont: Reduce water intake to reduce swelling (it makes it worse)
Stand in one place for long periods

travelAdvisory.note: Travel is safe. Keep moving during long flights.

warningSignsToWatch: Swelling is normal, but sudden facial swelling is a red flag for preeclampsia
milestoneDescription: The lungs are getting ready to breathe on their own.
